notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: LuJames Groover singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jacob Young. Pavin Smith scores. LuJames Groover to 3rd. LuJames Groover advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Jacob Young.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Andrés Chaparro. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Gabriel Moreno out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas flies out to right fielder Dylan Crews.

notableEvents.label: CJ Abrams GIDP
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams grounds into a double play, first baseman LuJames Groover to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo. Andrés Chaparro out at 2nd. CJ Abrams out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: LuJames Groover singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jacob Young. Pavin Smith scores. LuJames Groover to 3rd. LuJames Groover advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Jacob Young.
